info.title: Data2Evidence Config Json API
info.description: Source-derived OpenAPI spec for one Data2Evidence service/function. Tags describe UI usage, backend coverage, and handler trace state.

tags.name: handler-unresolved
tags.description: The route is known from UI or route metadata, but no concrete backend handler was found.

tags.name: service:config-json
tags.description: Operation belongs to the config-json service/function surface.

tags.name: ui-used
tags.description: Operation is called by at least one Data2Evidence UI.

tags.name: ui:vue-mri-ui-lib
tags.description: Operation is called by the vue-mri-ui-lib UI.

UnknownJson.description: Shape not inferred from UI or backend source.
